heading: Review of State applications
label: 10423 Review of State applications
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796ff–2 of Title 42
Effective Date of 2006 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–162section 1147 of Pub. L. 109–162section 10422 of this titleOct. 1, 2006

children.text: the application is consistent with the requirements of this subchapter; and
before the approval of the application the Attorney General has made an affirmative finding in writing that the proposed project has been reviewed in accordance with this subchapter.

children.heading: Approval
children.label: b Approval
children.text: Each application submitted under shall be considered approved, in whole or in part, by the Attorney General not later than 90 days after first received unless the Attorney General informs the applicant of specific reasons for disapproval.section 10422 of this title

children.heading: Restriction
children.label: c Restriction
children.text: Grant funds received under this subchapter shall not be used for land acquisition or construction projects.

children.heading: Disapproval notice and reconsideration
children.label: d Disapproval notice and reconsideration
children.text: The Attorney General shall not disapprove any application without first affording the applicant reasonable notice and an opportunity for reconsideration.

children.heading: Priority for partnerships with community-based drug treatment programs
children.label: e Priority for partnerships with community-based drug treatment programs
children.text: In considering an application submitted by a State under , the Attorney General shall give priority to an application that involves a partnership between the State and a community-based drug treatment program within the State.section 10422 of this title
